codeSystems.name: Barangays
codeSystems.title: Barangays
codeSystems.description: The Barangay codes valueset includes all barangay values from the Philippine Standard Geographic Codes (PSGC) published by the Philippine Statistic Authority (PSA).

codeSystems.name: Cities
codeSystems.title: Cities
codeSystems.description: All city values from the Philippine Standard Geographic Codes (PSGC) published by the Philippine Statistic Authority (PSA).

codeSystems.name: DrugsVS
codeSystems.title: Drugs
codeSystems.description: This value set includes all drug or medicament substance codes and all pharmaceutical/biologic products from FDA.

codeSystems.name: EducationalAttainments
codeSystems.title: Educational Attainments
codeSystems.description: All categories of educational programs, courses, and attainment levels in the Philippines, based on the Philippine Standard Classification of Education (PSCED) published by the Philippine Statistics Authority (PSA)

codeSystems.name: IndigenousGroupsVS
codeSystems.title: Indigenous Groups
codeSystems.description: A value set representing the recognized Indigenous groups to which a person may belong.

codeSystems.name: OccupationClassifications
codeSystems.title: Occupation Classifications
codeSystems.description: The Occupation codes valueset includes Occupational Classification values from the Philippine Standard Occupational Classification (PSOC) published by the Philippine Statistic Authority (PSA).

codeSystems.name: Provinces
codeSystems.title: Provinces
codeSystems.description: All province values from the Philippine Standard Geographic Codes (PSGC) published by the Philippine Statistic Authority (PSA).

codeSystems.name: Regions
codeSystems.title: Regions
codeSystems.description: The Region codes valueset includes all region values from the Philippine Standard Geographic Codes (PSGC) published by the Philippine Statistic Authority (PSA).
